About Us

Hi, we're ELOQUII, the ultimate fashion destination for sizes 14-32

READ MORE

So you’ve heard? It’s true. ELOQUII is the ultimate destination for trendy plus size fashion. From our broad selection of categories ranging from dresses to workwear to outerwear to jeans, we strive to provide the optimal shopping experience for the fashionable plus size customer in sizes 14-32. Not only do we seek out on trend styles, but we obsess over fit and quality. Taking trends from the runway to your closet, ELOQUII offers exactly what you need for both your professional and weekend wardrobe. Our dress selection boasts a range of styles from sequin party dresses, to work dresses, to casual maxis for your next event, holiday, or vacation. This summer, switch up your everyday sundress with a patterned romper. When you’re poolside, see our new swimwear collection for both one piece and bikini two piece options. If you’re not taking a summer Friday, keep it polished at the office (or home office) with a fitted blazer or power suit from our workwear collection. Whether you have a feminine or sporty look, our bottoms selection offers up just what you need: feminine skirts for date night or a pair of sleek Kady pants for the conference room. For Saturday fun, find more relaxed pieces like a casual dress or a lightweight top. Want it all? Keep an eye on our new arrivals page, bringing you the latest styles on site, updated every day.

Eloquii
